reviews.author: Kunal doshi
reviews.title: Very good product
reviews.body: Superb service very nice product installed very smothly by hameed bhai lock name cyphoe elite happy costomer battery life also good

reviews.author: Daljeet Singh
reviews.title: Nice product
reviews.body: Awesome product Qality is up to mark value for the money And same day installation done by technician Good service

reviews.author: Madaria
reviews.title: Must buy
reviews.body: Very good service same day installation at the time of delivery build quality and features are good really like the productive

reviews.author: Mohit
reviews.title: STRICTLY AVOID - poor service from installation to customer support to Amazon
reviews.body: Pathetic installation service - destroyed the door, made it incompatible with other locks and doesnt work as expected - 0 information with installation team abt app unlocking features and number of users. Initially said only 2 can have app access then 4 then subject to approval of atomberg!! What a pathetic customer support and installation team
